title: ekaC
description: ekaC is a little mod that adds some inverted things, and make the cake more practical.
body:
# ekaC - Inverted cake
### This mod will not be updated, new project: [CakeDelight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cakedelight)

This mod adds a new inverted cake to eat, and it has same functions as vanilla cake. Right click to eat and recover 2 points hunger value.

And there are some inverted things in this mod.

![wth image](https://i.gyazo.com/6f00e622ca9a11044805e048b1d30def.png)

The recipes is also inverted.

If there's any bugs, please submit an issue on GitHub.


## FAQ

Q: <= 1.12.2?\
A:     :(     In general, absolutely impossible.


Q: Can I include ekaC Mod in my modpack?\
A: Yes, but you need to annotate ekaCMod's Modrinth page for non-self-use modpack.


Q: Can I distribute ekaC Mod?\
A: Please get my permission before you distribute ekaC Mod.
